title: Optimising a urinary extraction method for non-targeted GC-MS metabolomics.
author: Olivier C Allen B Luies L
content: S-EPMC10579216 PMC10579216 Optimising a urinary extraction method for non-targeted GC-MS metabolomics. Urine is ideal for non-targeted metabolomics, providing valuable insights into normal and pathological cellular processes. Optimal extraction is critical since non-targeted metabolomics aims
